case_title: DANG, VAN LE VS SARACENI, RAY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY DANG, VAN LE AS TO DEFENDANT SARACENI, RAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
